name: AddressBook
tagline: NPC, creature & location finder for TBC Anniversary with TomTom integration
description: Find any NPC or creature in Azeroth and Outland. Browse 13,600+ locations with 83,000+ spawn points across 110 zones. Quest givers, trainers, vendors, creatures, critters, instance mobs, and more. Set TomTom waypoints with a single click, view all spawn points on the map, and record your own custom locations.

features.title: 13,600+ Locations
features.description: Quest givers, trainers, vendors, flight masters, innkeepers, 7,500+ creatures, 425 critters, instance entrances, and more.

features.title: Creature Spawn Maps
features.description: Every creature stores all known spawn points. Right-click to Set All Waypoints and light up the map.

features.title: Category Browser
features.description: Organized tree with sortable columns, continent/zone filtering, and auto-detect for your current zone.

features.title: TomTom Integration
features.description: One-click waypoint navigation. Instance creatures auto-redirect to dungeon entrances from the open world.

features.title: Addon API
features.description: Other addons can look up NPCs and set waypoints programmatically via AddressBook.API.

features.title: Favorites & Custom Entries
features.description: Bookmark locations, save custom entries, and access favorites from the minimap button.

screenshots.alt: AddressBook main window showing NPC categories and search
screenshots.caption: Browse and search 13,600+ NPCs and creatures across Azeroth and Outland
